case_title: LING LA VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LA, LING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $2,453.10 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,503.10 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

ORDER ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED***
